concepts.name: 虚拟滚动 + 树形扁平化（Virtual Scroll with Tree Flattening）
concepts.description: 将递归 DOM 树迁移为扁平化数组 + react-window 虚拟滚动：用 useFlattenedTree hook 将嵌套的文件夹树递归展开为 FlatTreeItem[]，配合 useIndexTree 实现 O(1) 查找，解决大量文件夹节点导致的 DOM 性能问题

ffdca971 feat(list-view): add FlatTreeItem type and useFlattenedTree hook

concepts.name: 拖拽系统高级模式（@dnd-kit Advanced Patterns）

concepts.name: 文件移动的冲突解决与失败回滚（Move Conflict Resolution & Rollback）

concepts.name: WebSocket 重连安全机制（WebSocket Reconnect Safety）
concepts.description: WebSocket 连接的健壮性设计：离线检测（navigator.onLine + online/offline 事件）、重连时的竞态防护（防止多个重连同时进行）、指数退避重试、以及重试状态的 UI 反馈

concepts.name: 批量操作设计模式（Batch Operations Design Pattern）
concepts.description: 设计文档驱动的 Trash 批量删除：区分清空全部和删除选中的独立端点、带 cleared_file_ids 的幂等 API 响应、store 层 Set<number> 选择管理、本地 Radix Dialog 确认、mutation flags 禁用并发操作
source_commits: dbeac217 docs: add empty trash design and plan

existing_implementations.approach: Finder delete: optimistic remove + backup nodesByPath/childrenByPath, UndoEntry for revert, global modal confirmation
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: Backup entire tree state → optimistic delete → on success create UndoEntry → on failure restore from backup

existing_implementations.approach: Finder move: POST batched with file_ids, returns successfulIds + failedIds, per-item conflict dialog loop, partial rollback on failure
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: Optimistic rename → API returns success/fail split → restore failed items → emit ITEMS_MOVED event

deep_analysis.comparison: Trash delete uses separate endpoints (empty vs selected) with idempotent responses (cleared_file_ids), local Radix dialogs, no undo. Finder delete uses global modal, UndoEntry for revert, no detailed response. Finder move handles partial failure with per-item conflict resolution and rollback queue.
deep_analysis.trade_offs: Trash: simpler (irreversible, no conflicts), idempotent, explicit confirmation. Finder delete: reversible via undo, optimistic for speed. Finder move: most complex but handles conflicts and partial failures gracefully.
deep_analysis.decision_guide: Irreversible + no conflicts → Trash pattern (idempotent API, explicit dialog). Reversible + no conflicts → Finder delete (optimistic + UndoEntry). Reversible + may conflict → Move pattern (per-item resolution, partial rollback).

concepts.name: 竞态条件防护模式集（Race Condition Prevention Patterns）
concepts.description: React + 异步工作流中防止竞态的五种模式：版本计数器（作废过时加载）、双重守卫（state + ref 去重）、布尔标志（并发防护）、AbortController（流取消）、定时器抑制（事件防抖）
source_commits: 1c5fec8c fix: type errors, duplicate upload button, new chat race condition, and nav switch bugs
457754c9 fix: prevent stale history overwriting new conversation and drag-select deselection
454210ba fix: clear sendToAgent payload in error catch to prevent duplicate sends
c36b2a62 fix: remove duplicate plus icon in chat input area

existing_implementations.approach: Version counter: loadVersionRef increments on createConversation, stale loads check and bail
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: const v = loadVersionRef.current; await fetch(); if (v !== loadVersionRef.current) return;

existing_implementations.approach: Dual guard: state null check + processedPayloadRef JSON.stringify dedup
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: if (!payload) return; const key = JSON.stringify(payload); if (key === ref.current) return;

existing_implementations.approach: Boolean flag: connectingRef prevents concurrent OAuth popup opens
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: if (ref.current) return; ref.current = true; try {} finally { ref.current = false; }

existing_implementations.approach: AbortController: cancel SSE stream on conversation switch or unmount
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: abortControllerRef.current = new AbortController(); fetch(url, { signal: ref.current.signal })

existing_implementations.approach: Timer suppression: suppressClickRef with armSuppressClick(ms) and re-arm on commitAndReset
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: armSuppressClick(200) on drag start; armSuppressClick(300) on commitAndReset

deep_analysis.comparison: Version counter invalidates stale async results without canceling them. Dual guard prevents duplicate processing of same payload across re-renders. Boolean flag blocks concurrent execution. AbortController cancels in-flight network operations. Timer suppression prevents post-transition events.
deep_analysis.trade_offs: Version counter: simple, works for any async, but stale request still completes (wasted bandwidth). AbortController: cancels early, saves bandwidth, but more complex setup. Boolean flag: simplest, but blocks all concurrent calls. Dual guard: handles React's batching, but JSON.stringify has performance cost for large payloads.
deep_analysis.decision_guide: Cancel network request → AbortController. Invalidate stale result → Version counter. Prevent duplicate processing → Dual guard. Block concurrent calls → Boolean flag. Suppress events during transitions → Timer suppression.

concepts.name: Tiptap InputRule 斜杠命令节点（Tiptap InputRule for Slash Commands）
concepts.description: 通过 Tiptap InputRule 正则触发的自定义内联节点：用户输入 /skillName 加空格后自动替换为不可编辑的原子标签。关键修复：正则需包含尾随 \s$（因为 InputRule 在字符插入后触发），范围计算用 indexOf 而非 endsWith
source_commits: 084f5372 fix: InlineSkillNode InputRule triggers on space after /command
b32942b0 feat: add V2 fields to ApiSkill interface and transform

existing_implementations.approach: Manual command insertion (no InputRule), uses ReactNodeViewRenderer for interactive UI with name and filledValue attributes
Block node from markdown parsing, standard HTML img rendering with async upload state tracking
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: Standard Node.create with HTML rendering, no InputRule, handles paste/upload lifecycle

existing_implementations.approach: Mark extension using markInputRule() helper for text formatting like ==highlight==

deep_analysis.comparison: InlineSlashNode uses InputRule for auto-trigger on typing + atom node (non-editable span). TemplatePlaceholder uses manual command + ReactNodeViewRenderer (full React component). CustomImage is block-level with no InputRule. CustomHighlight is a Mark (text formatting) not a Node.
deep_analysis.trade_offs: InputRule: automatic, great UX for typing patterns, but regex timing is tricky (fires after character insertion). ReactNodeViewRenderer: full React rendering power, but heavier and not auto-triggered. Marks: simplest for text formatting, but can't represent complex content.
deep_analysis.decision_guide: Auto-trigger on typing pattern → InputRule + Atom Node. Needs interactive React UI → ReactNodeViewRenderer. Text formatting only → Mark extension. Block-level media → Standard HTML Node.

concepts.name: SSE 流式通信三层架构（SSE Streaming 3-Layer Architecture）
concepts.description: Chat Panel 的完整 SSE 数据流转管线：三层架构 — StreamManager（连接控制/重试/TTL/AbortController）→ AIStreamProcessor（事件分发/Agent-SubAgent 聚合/Tool 流式处理）→ MessageBuilder（增量消息构建/Part 合并/UIBlock）。通过 AsyncGenerator yield 链式传递 ProcessedEvent，useAIStream hook 消费并更新 React 状态
source_commits: d8a095db feat: add UIBlock interactive cards (ask_user + suggest_connectors)
8a657b9c feat: redesign AskUserCard — vertical list, custom input, skip
2df16ddd fix: use sentinel UID for temp conversation to prevent stale reload
454210ba fix: clear sendToAgent payload in error catch to prevent duplicate sends
67a92317 feat: add slash command menu (/) for quick access to Add files and Skills

existing_implementations.approach: Simple SSE: 直接调用 @microsoft/fetch-event-source，单一 onmessage 回调处理所有事件，无分层、无重试、无 Agent 聚合
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: fetchEventSource(url, { onmessage(msg) { onMessage(msg.data); }, onerror(err) { throw err; } })

existing_implementations.approach: 自定义 fetchEventSource 库：基于 ReadableStream 的字节级 SSE 解析，支持 Last-Event-ID 重连、visibility change 自动重连、自定义 onopen 验证
连接管理层：AsyncGenerator 封装 fetchEventSource，管理 Request-ID/Last-Event-ID、指数退避重试（AUTO/MANUAL/RELOAD 策略）、TTL 过期降级、visibility retry、AbortController 可中断 sleep
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: async *streamWithRetry() { while(true) { yield* connectAndStream(); // 错误时分类 → 自动重试或 yield error } }

existing_implementations.approach: 事件处理层：消费 AsyncGenerator<RawSSEEvent>，switch 分发 20+ 事件类型，管理 Agent/SubAgent 状态机、Tool 生命周期、文件流式预览、历史消息回放
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: async *processEventStream(eventStream) { for await (const event of eventStream) { yield* processEvent(event); } }

existing_implementations.approach: 消息构建层：增量构建 Message 对象，基于 eventId 合并连续同类 Part，支持 text/thinking/coding/image/table/tool_call/ui_block/agent_block 等 11 种 Part 类型
existing_implementations.key_code_pattern: appendText(content, type, eventId) { if (lastPart.eventId === eventId) merge; else push new; }

deep_analysis.comparison: 项目中存在两套 SSE 方案：(1) htmlEditor/refine.ts 的简单方案：单层回调，无分层无重试，~50 行代码，适合一次性 AI 编辑请求；(2) Chat 系统的三层架构：StreamManager→AIStreamProcessor→MessageBuilder，~2500 行代码，支持多 Agent 嵌套、Tool 流式文件预览、断点续传、TTL 降级重载。核心差异在于 Chat 需要处理复杂的 Agent 层级（主 Agent + SubAgent）和 Tool 生命周期（start→stream→result→end），而 htmlEditor 只需要简单的文本流。
deep_analysis.trade_offs: 简单方案（refine.ts）：代码少、易维护、无状态管理开销，但不支持重试、不能处理多 Agent、不能做断点续传。三层架构（Chat）：功能完整、健壮、可扩展，但代码量大（2500+ 行）、调试复杂（事件要经过 3 层转换才到 UI）、新增事件类型需要修改 streamProcessor 的 switch。
deep_analysis.decision_guide: 单向文本流 + 一次性请求（如 AI 编辑）→ 简单方案（直接 fetchEventSource + 单回调）。多 Agent 嵌套 + Tool 流式 + 需要重试/断点续传 → 三层架构。介于两者之间（如需要重试但无 Agent 嵌套）→ 只用 StreamManager + 简单 processor，跳过 MessageBuilder 的复杂 Part 系统。

weeks.summary: FinderListView 虚拟滚动重构、拖拽系统增强、HTML Publish 功能、文件分享、WebSocket 重连加固
Customize View 全新页面、Pipedream OAuth 集成、UIBlock 交互卡片、下载导出重构、积分争议系统、Trash 批量删除、Chat 竞态修复、Tiptap InlineSlashNode

learning_recommendations.why: Fixed 4 race condition bugs using 5 ad-hoc patterns — need systematic mental model for when React re-renders cause async overlap
learning_recommendations.how: Read React docs 'Synchronizing with Effects' race conditions section; compare all 5 patterns side-by-side; use React DevTools Highlight Updates during rapid conversation switching

learning_recommendations.why: Fixed InputRule regex bug by pattern-matching, not understanding ProseMirror's transaction model — need to predict timing issues, not debug them
learning_recommendations.how: Read ProseMirror inputrules package source (~200 lines); add console.log to observe state.doc content at InputRule handler time

learning_recommendations.why: W13 was 100% frontend (8 concepts, 0 backend). Designed trash delete API contract but only touched frontend. Understanding server-side transactions, soft-delete vs hard-delete, bulk optimization would improve API design skills
learning_recommendations.how: Check trash delete endpoint server implementation; research database transaction patterns for bulk operations; consider GDPR implications of soft-delete (trash_cleared_at) vs hard-delete

weeks.summary: Scheduled Tasks UI、Folder Tree Side Panel、Slash Command Menu、Chat AttachMenu Connectors/Skills 子菜单、深入分析 Chat SSE 三层流式架构

learning_recommendations.why: Chat SSE 架构大量使用 async *generator yield 链式传递事件，但目前 eventQueue 无上限。高频事件可能导致内存压力，需要理解 JS AsyncGenerator 的背压行为
learning_recommendations.how: 读源码：streamManager.ts connectAndStream() 中的 eventQueue 实现；做实验：模拟 1000+ 事件/秒测试内存表现；看文档：MDN AsyncGenerator protocol + TC39 async iteration proposal

learning_recommendations.topic: SSE vs WebSocket 的系统性对比
learning_recommendations.why: 项目里 Chat 用 SSE（单向流 + POST body），KuseClaw 用 WebSocket（双向）。两者的选型理由、重连策略、代理兼容性差异需要系统化理解
learning_recommendations.how: 对比 streamManager.ts 的 SSE 重连（Last-Event-ID 断点续传）和 WebSocket reconnect 的状态恢复差异；测试 CDN/Nginx proxy 对 SSE 和 WS 的 timeout 行为

learning_recommendations.topic: 事件驱动状态机设计（Agent/Tool 生命周期）
learning_recommendations.why: streamProcessor.ts 管理 20+ 事件类型和 Agent/SubAgent/Tool 多层状态机，但没有用显式的状态机库。理解何时需要正式状态机 vs switch 就够用
learning_recommendations.how: 画出 Agent 状态转换图（starting→executing→completed/error）和 Tool 状态转换图；研究 XState 的 actor model 是否适合这个场景；对比当前 Map<string, State> 方案的优缺点

learning_recommendations.topic: 后端 SSE 事件设计（协议层）
learning_recommendations.why: 前端消费了 20+ 种事件类型但对后端如何 produce 这些事件不了解。理解后端的事件生成逻辑有助于调试前后端不匹配问题
learning_recommendations.how: 读后端 API 的 SSE response 生成代码（conversation/chat endpoint）；关注事件顺序保证、agent_execution_id 的分配逻辑、error 事件的触发条件
